claim_boundary: single live transfer trial; not generalization evidence

planning_steps: Read the square-sum requirements and identify input constraints, output format, and edge cases.
Derive the simplest mathematically equivalent formulation, using a closed-form sum-of-squares identity when its numeric range is safe.
Implement the smallest change with explicit handling for boundary values and the required numeric type.
Check the result against small manually computed cases and at least one boundary case.
If any discrepancy appears, revisit the formula, type range, and formatting before finalizing.
strategy_artifact.reflection: The original plan was correct but underspecified. This revision adds constraint-aware mathematical simplification, numeric-safety checks, and focused validation while remaining bounded.
strategy_artifact.system_instruction: Solve the square-sum task carefully: preserve exact semantics, prefer a proven closed form when safe, use an adequate numeric type, and keep the change minimal.
